item.title: LEGO Star Wars 75403 Grogu with Hover Pram Building Toy Set Collectible Character Figure for The Mandalorian TV Show Fans Display Gift Idea for 10+ Year Old Boys & Girls
item.description:
You’ve got LEGO Star Wars 75403 Grogu with Hover Pram Building Toy Set Collectible Character Figure for The Mandalorian TV Show Fans Display Gift Idea for 10+ Year Old Boys & Girls at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • Star Wars collectables – Includes a Grogu information plaque on a stand with space for the included standard-size LEGO Star Wars Grogu minifigure
  • LEGO Star Wars sets for kids and adults – LEGO Star Wars collectable toy building sets (sold separately) let fans recreate classic scenes, make up stories or display the buildable models
  • Intuitive instructions – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive building adventure with tools to zoom in and rotate a 3D digital version of the model
  • Build-and-display model – The Grogu figure features dial-operated arms, a posable head and ears, and can be displayed in or out of the hover pram
  • LEGO Star Wars buildable Grogu toy and hover pram to build – Let kids create a cute Star Wars: The Mandalorian display featuring the Grogu figure
  • Star Wars gifts for kids – This 1,048-piece LEGO building kit makes a fun gift for 10+ year old boys, girls and Star Wars: The Mandalorian fans
  • Authentic accessories – This Star Wars playset includes a LEGO brick-built Sorgan frog, a shifter knob and a cookie for Grogu to hold in his hands

🛒 Check the deal!!

item.description:
You’ve got LEGO Star Wars Captain Rex Helmet Set The Clone Wars Collectible for Adults 2023 Series Model Collection Memorabilia Gift Idea for Him or Her 75349 at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • Number of Pieces: 854
  • Proudly display this LEGO Star Wars memorabilia model on the brick-built stand with a nameplate; makes an attention-grabbing décor piece
  • Features a highly-detailed LEGO Star Wars Captain Rex Helmet model set which allows fans to pay tribute to the 501st Legion Clone Commander
  • This 854-piece LEGO Star Wars set for adults makes a great gift for any fan, an experienced LEGO builder or a Star Wars LEGO helmet collector
  • Part of a collection of LEGO Star Wars collectible helmets to build and display; includes picture instructions in print and on the LEGO Builder app

item.title: LEGO Marvel Dancing Groot Buildable Animated Toy Action Figure Guardians of the Galaxy Character Kids’ Hand-Operated Interactive Playset Super Hero Gift for 10 Plus Year Old Boys and Girls 76297
item.description:
You can find LEGO Marvel Dancing Groot Buildable Animated Toy Action Figure Guardians of the Galaxy Character Kids’ Hand-Operated Interactive Playset Super Hero Gift for 10 Plus Year Old Boys and Girls 76297 with a discount here:

ℹ️:

  • Interactive dancing Groot – When kids turn a handle at the rear of the building toy, the jointed Groot Marvel figure gets funky
  • Guardians of the Galaxy gift – Treat fans of Marvel’s Groot, Super Heroes and buildable LEGO toys to this interactive playset, which makes a fun Marvel-themed gift for 10-plus-year-old boys and girls
  • Dancing Super Hero – Includes a buildable Groot figure in a flower pot, 3 different nameplates plus headphones, sunglasses and extra leaves
  • Super Hero playset – Groot’s head turns, his arms are posable, and the pot includes a built-in storage compartment for all the accessories
  • 3D building instructions – With the LEGO Builder app, builders can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, track their progress and save virtual sets
  • Buildable Groot animated toy for kids – Dancing Groot is an interactive building toy for 10-plus-year-old boys and girls
  • More LEGO Marvel playsets – The extensive range of LEGO Marvel building toys puts an ever-changing universe of imaginative Super Hero adventures into kids’ hands
